comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Fixed in 06e59926 (+ the completion.py:91 E501 cleared earlier in d3ece706). All 28 ruff errors + 15 unformatted files resolved via ruff format + ruff check --fix + manual E402/E731/E501 fixes; lint/format-only, zero behavior change. Verified all gating checks green: ruff check src tests PASS; ruff format --check src tests PASS; mypy src/rebar/{reducer,graph,_store} PASS; pytest -m 'not integration and not external' = 2526 passed, 12 skipped. On AC#2 (version consistency): the floor is documented in pyproject ([dev] ruff>=0.6) and CI runs the same 'ruff check src tests' against the same resolved ruff as local, so they agree; the tree is validated clean against the current ruff (0.15.6).

compiled_state.description:
## What

`ruff check src tests` (the project's documented lint gate over the
`E,F,W,I,UP,B` families, per `pyproject.toml [tool.ruff.lint]`) currently reports
**29 errors** — the gate is RED. These are **pre-existing**, introduced by recent
completion-verifier and sync-union work, NOT by the 2026-06-18 maintenance epic
(every file the epic touched is ruff-clean). Discovered while verifying that epic.

## Reproduction Steps

```
ruff check src tests   # ruff 0.15.x
```

**Expected:** no errors (the docs describe the tree as clean for its own ruff gate).
**Actual:** 29 errors — 24 `E501` (line-too-long), 2 `E731` (lambda-assignment), 2
`I001` (unsorted-imports), 1 `E402` (module-import-not-at-top).

## Affected files

- `src/rebar/llm/completion.py` (1 — E501)
- `src/rebar/_commands/_seam.py` (1 — E402: the mid-file `import re as _re`)
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/apply_inbound.py` (1 — E501 in the labels block)
- `tests/interfaces/store/test_completion_verifier.py` (12)
- `tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_completion_gate.py` (7)
- `tests/interfaces/store/test_gitattributes_merge.py` (3)
- `tests/interfaces/facades/test_verify_completion_facades.py` (2)
- `tests/unit/test_sync_union_recovery.py` (2)

## Likely cause / note

CI may currently pass because the workflow pins an older ruff (`ruff>=0.6`) that does
not flag these, while a fresh `ruff` (0.15.x) does. Worth confirming the CI ruff
version and either pinning a known-good version or fixing the lint so local and CI
agree. Most are `E501` (wrap the line); the 2 `I001`/1 `E402` are import-ordering.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` exits 0 (all 29 errors fixed: wrap the E501 lines; sort the
  I001 imports; move/relocate the E402 import or add a scoped noqa with a reason; convert
  the E731 lambdas to defs).
- [ ] CI runs a ruff version consistent with what fixes were validated against (pin or
  document the floor), so local and CI agree.
- [ ] No behavior change — lint-only.
</content>
compiled_state.title: ruff gate is red: 29 pre-existing E501/E731/I001/E402 errors in src+tests
